## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `gradle assembleDebug --no-daemon`
- [ ] Verified on Wear OS emulator or device
- [ ] Screenshots or recordings attached if UI changed

## Screenshots

Add before/after screenshots when the PR changes UI or interaction.

## Risks

- What could regress?
- Any follow-up work still pending?

## Checklist

- [ ] Kept the watch UI glanceable and tap-friendly
- [ ] Avoided unrelated changes
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
